Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "BERZERK-ARLASOFT-48C5" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Berzerk v1.1 (Arlasoft - 2022).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following changes were made to remove highscore loading and saving to disk: 1. NOP'd out the JSR $492E instruction at $48EA 2. NOP'd out the JSR $1385 instruction at $439E
